title: more armour sci-fi series
description: adds armour from Star wars to minecraft
body:
adds new armour sets:
clone armour - like diamond but a bit worse. made from iron and blaze rods

mandalorian armour - a bit better than netherite but super expensive,
if [jetpacks sci-fi series ](https://modrinth.com/datapack/jetpacks-sci-fi-series) is installed enables jetpack flight.

more comming soon! hopefully.

clone and mandalorian armour are dyeable!

Recipes from the datapack
